name: Nauryzbay
description: Nauryzbay joins Nauryz — the Central Asian Turkic form of Nowruz, the Persian new year (nau, 'new,' plus ruz, 'day') — with bay, a Turkic title for a wealthy or respected man. It's a traditional name for a child born during the Nauryz spring festival, and belongs historically to Nauryzbai Batyr, a 19th-century Kazakh warrior who fought alongside Kenesary Khan against Russian imperial expansion.
